steps.text: Write the normal temperature range as an inequality: $97.7 \leq T \leq 99.1$ (inclusive on both ends).

• Choice A — $97.6^{\circ}\text{F}$: $97.6 \lt 97.7$, below the lower bound. Incorrect.
  • Choice B — $97.5^{\circ}\text{F}$: $97.5 \lt 97.7$, below the lower bound. Incorrect.
  • Choice C — $98.8^{\circ}\text{F}$: $97.7 \leq 98.8 \leq 99.1$, within the normal range. That confirms C is correct.
  • Choice D — $99.4^{\circ}\text{F}$: $99.4 \gt 99.1$, above the upper bound. Incorrect.
